# Welcome to Test Docs

This is the home page for the test documentation site.

## Getting Started

Follow these steps to get started with the project.

### Prerequisites

You need PHP 8.3+ and Composer installed.

## Features

- Static site generation
- OpenAPI support
- Full-text search

Check the [Installation Guide](installation.md) to get started.

See the [Configuration section](installation.md#configuration) for more details.

```php
echo 'Hello World';
```
